summary: Backend API testing completed for Quran Teaching Platform (مقرأة الرقي). All 35 tests passed successfully. Both reported bugs (message send and profile picture upload) are working correctly at the API level.
critical_code_review_comments: All backend APIs are functioning correctly
Bug #1 (Message send) - POST /api/messages/send and POST /api/messages/send-to-teacher both work correctly
Bug #2 (Profile picture upload) - POST /api/users/upload-picture works correctly with base64 images
Session cancellation with mandatory reason works correctly
Admin announcements and all-bookings work correctly (admin-only access enforced)
Session notes and student progress tracking work correctly
seed_data_creation: Test users (teacher, student, admin) created with session tokens for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are working. If frontend issues persist with message send or profile picture upload, the problem is likely in the frontend code (JavaScript/React), not the backend. Test credentials can be created using the mongosh commands in /app/auth_testing.md. The admin email is m0m0077100@gmail.com.
